hero.title: I speak your language too
hero.subtitle: SignBridge connects deaf patients with our healthcare professionals through intuitive technology, ensuring clear, empathetic, and barrier-free medical care.

live_translate.title: Live Translate
live_translate.desc: Real-time Sign to Text using our Empathetic Lens AI.

text_to_sign.title: Text to Sign
text_to_sign.desc: Convert typed messages into sign language avatars.

values.title: Our values
values.subtitle: It's not them who don't understand us. It's us who don't understand them.

items.title: Empathy first
items.desc: Every feature is designed thinking about how the deaf person feels, not just how the technology works.

items.title: Bridge, not wall
items.desc: We don't 'fix' anyone. We create a bidirectional bridge between two equally valid ways of communicating.

items.title: Universal access
items.desc: No special hardware, no hidden costs. Just a phone and the willingness to communicate.

items.title: Their voice, their choice
items.desc: Every deaf person chooses how they want to be heard. Technology adapts to the person, not the other way around.

practice.title: Practice Mode
practice.desc: Level up your sign language fluency with personalized drills.
practice.show_sign: Show this sign to the camera

steps.title: The deaf person signs
steps.desc: The camera detects 21 hand landmarks in real time. No extra hardware needed.

steps.title: AI interprets
steps.desc: MediaPipe and Gemini recognize each LSM sign in milliseconds.

steps.title: Voice is generated
steps.desc: The translated text becomes natural voice. The deaf person chooses which voice they want to be heard with.

cta.title: It's not a camera demo.
cta.title2: It's a conversation that can finally happen.
cta.desc: The experience is optimized for mobile because that's where it truly matters: open, point, and listen.

translator.loading_desc: Opening camera and preparing real-time detection.
translator.idle_desc: Tap start, point the camera at the person signing and let SignBridge interpret aloud.
translator.subtitle_placeholder: Subtitles will appear here once we detect your hand.

auth.subtitle: The translator is open, but your practice and learning progress is linked to your account.
auth.sidebar_title: What gets linked to your account
auth.benefit_1: Progress per letter and mastered signs.
auth.benefit_3: Learning module in the next phase.

academy.title: Sign Language Academy
academy.subtitle: Learn sign language step by step, like a game. Each lesson brings you closer to fluid communication.
academy.quit_confirm: Are you sure you want to quit? You'll lose your progress in this lesson.

alphabet.title: The Alphabet
alphabet.desc: Learn to sign every letter from A to Z.

greetings.title: Greetings
greetings.desc: Hello, goodbye, and basic everyday greetings.

numbers.title: Numbers
numbers.desc: Count from 0 to 20 in sign language.

medical.title: Medical Context
medical.desc: Signs for pain, symptoms, and hospital communication.

emotions.title: Emotions
emotions.desc: Express feelings: happy, sad, scared, and more.

lesson_types.camera_challenge: Show the sign to the camera

empty_state.title: Start your journey
empty_state.desc: Begin with the alphabet and unlock new units as you progress.
